title: $:/plugins/wikilabs/link-to-tabs
name: Link to Tabs
description: Internal links are added to tabs if selected
author: Mario Pietsch
text:
{"tiddlers":{"$:/plugins/wikilabs/link-to-tabs/config":{"title":"$:/plugins/wikilabs/link-to-tabs/config","created":"20190712133008077","initial-opacity":"0.7","modified":"20190714104541701","show-all-links":"none","show-single-link":"inline-block","transition":"0.3","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"This tiddler is used to configure the "Link-to-tabs" plugin behaviour. There are 4 fields, which are used by [[$:/plugins/wikilabs/link-to-tabs/styles]] enable and disable the internal links. * show-all-links: {{!!show-all-links}} * show-single-link: {{!!show-single-link}} * initial-opacity: {{!!initial-opacity}} * transition time in seconds: {{!!transition}} "},"$:/plugins/wikilabs/link-to-tabs/macros/tabs":{"title":"$:/plugins/wikilabs/link-to-tabs/macros/tabs","tags":"$:/tags/Macro","code-body":"yes","text":"\define link-action(message:"tm-navigate" icon:"$:/core/images/link") \whitespace trim <$linkcatcher message=<<__message__>> > <$link overrideClass="" to=<> > <$transclude $tiddler=<<__icon__>>/> \end \define tabs-tab-indicator() \whitespace trim <$let pluginTab=`$(save-currentTiddler)$/$(currentTiddler)$` currentTiddler=`${[!is[blank]thenelse]}$` > <$let shadowClass={{{ [all[current]is[shadow]then[wltc-is-shadow]] ~[[]] }}}> }}}> <% if [all[current]!is[shadow]] :filter[[$:/plugins/wikilabs/link-to-tabs/config]get[link-action]match[tm-edit-tiddler]] %> <> <% elseif [all[current]is[tiddler]] :filter[[$:/plugins/wikilabs/link-to-tabs/config]get[shadow-action]match[tm-edit-tiddler]] %> <> <% else %> <> <% endif %> \end \define tabs-tab() \whitespace trim <$set name="save-currentTiddler" value=<>> <$tiddler tiddler=<>> <> <> \end "},"$:/plugins/wikilabs/link-to-tabs/history":{"title":"$:/plugins/wikilabs/link-to-tabs/history","text":"V 3.2.0 - 2026-04-08 * Stop shadowing core tabs macro — only override `tabs-tab` sub-macro * Add `wltc-is-shadow` CSS class for shadow tiddler tab icons V 3.1.0 - 2026-04-08 * Fix muted colour for link icon * Update accessibility changes from core V 3.0.1 - 2024-05-23 * Add stability badges ** The development status of a plugin: deprecated, experimental, stable, or legacy V 3.0.0 - 2023-12-28 * The ''edit-tabs'' plugin will be ''deprecated'' and be replaced by link-to-tabs * There are 2 new settings now ** Clicking a tab-link opens ''non-system'' tiddlers in edit mode ** Clicking a tab-link opens ''every existing'' tiddler in edit mode * New "settings" tab in the plugin * New "settings" tab in the ''$:/ControlPanel -> Settings -> WikiLabs'' tab V 2.4.0 - 2023-12-28 * Update tabs-macro to TW v5.3.3 V 2.3.0 - 2023-07-17 * Updateto TW v5.3.0 * Tabs in ControlPanel -> Plugins -> Plugin Info area work now. ** Except the "contents" tab, since it's a "virtual" one. V 2.2.0 - 2022-03-27 * update to TW v5.2.2 * ''Important'': Changed license to Attribution-NonCommercial-ShareAlike -- [[CC-BY-NC-SA|$:/plugins/wikilabs/link-to-tabs/license]] V 2.1.0 - 2022-02-17 * New $:/core/macros/tabs * much more hackable and added dynamic tabs ** tabs can have a `condition` field now. V 2.0.1 - 2020-12-25 * update license V 2.0.0 - 2020.12.05 * Update $:/core/macros/tabs to V5.1.23 V 1.1.1 - 2020.01.19 * Update license link/text V 1.1.0 - 2019.07.14 * Add new option: Initially hide link ** Transition time from hidden to visible is adjustable * Added: "Reset to Default" button V 1.0.1 - 2019.02.18 * link-to-tabs works in drop-down elements now. V 1.0.0 - 2019.02.14 * Use core tabs-macro from TW 5.1.19 V <1.0.0 * Use core tabs-macro from TW 5.1.15 "},"$:/plugins/wikilabs/link-to-tabs/icon":{"title":"$:/plugins/wikilabs/link-to-tabs/icon","text":" "},"$:/plugins/wikilabs/link-to-tabs/license":{"title":"$:/plugins/wikilabs/link-to-tabs/license","license-text":"https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/legalcode","text":"[[Link-to-Tabs-Macro|https://wikilabs.github.io/#link-to-tabs]] (c) Mario Pietsch - 2016<> [[Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-ShareAlike|https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/]] "},"$:/plugins/wikilabs/link-to-tabs/readme":{"title":"$:/plugins/wikilabs/link-to-tabs/readme","text":"This plugin adds a little link icon to every tab. !! Settings * Have a closer look at the "settings-tab" here or * Open the ''$:/ControlPanel -> Settings -> WikiLabs'' tab ''Important:'' This plugin overrides the core `tabs-tab` macro defined in [[$:/core/macros/tabs]] !! CSS Classes The link icon `` element uses the following classes: |!Class |!Description | |`wltc-link-to-tab` |Base class — always present | |`wltc-is-shadow` |Tab tiddler is a shadow tiddler | !! Customisation Examples Add the CSS below to a stylesheet tiddler tagged `$:/tags/Stylesheet`. !!! Hide icons in sidebar tabs ```css .tc-sidebar-tabs .wltc-link-to-tab { display: none; } ``` !!! Style shadow tiddler tab icons differently ```css .wltc-is-shadow svg { color: <>; opacity: 0.5; } ``` !!! Hide icons in tiddlers with a specific tag Use the `data-tags` attribute on `.tc-tiddler-view-frame`: ```css [data-tags*="MyTag"].tc-tiddler-view-frame .wltc-link-to-tab { display: none; } ``` !!! Resize icons in tiddlers with a specific tag ```css [data-tags*="MyTag"].tc-tiddler-view-frame .tc-tab-selected + .wltc-link-to-tab svg { width: 2.0em; height: 2.0em; } ```"},"$:/plugins/wikilabs/link-to-tabs/settings":{"title":"$:/plugins/wikilabs/link-to-tabs/settings","caption":"Link-to-Tabs","created":"20190712133607244","modified":"20190714104631250","tags":"$:/tags/ControlPanel/WikiLabs","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"The full documentation can be found at [[links-to-tabs plugin|https://wikilabs.github.io/editions/link-to-tabs/]] main page. <$checkbox tiddler="$:/plugins/wikilabs/link-to-tabs/config" field="show-all-links" checked="inline-block" unchecked="none" default="none"> Show internal tab link for ''all tabs'' <$checkbox tiddler="$:/plugins/wikilabs/link-to-tabs/config" field="show-single-link" checked="inline-block" unchecked="none" default="inline-block"> Show internal tab link for ''selected tabs'' <$checkbox tiddler="$:/plugins/wikilabs/link-to-tabs/config" field="initial-opacity" checked="0" unchecked="0.7" default="0.7"> Tab links are initially hidden and need mouse hover to become visible.
The transition time in seconds is: <$edit-text tiddler="$:/plugins/wikilabs/link-to-tabs/config" field="transition" default="0.3"/> <$checkbox tiddler="$:/plugins/wikilabs/link-to-tabs/config" field="link-action" checked="tm-edit-tiddler" unchecked="tm-navigate" default="tm-navigate"> Clicking a tab-link opens ''non-shadow'' tiddlers in ''edit mode'' <$checkbox tiddler="$:/plugins/wikilabs/link-to-tabs/config" field="shadow-action" checked="tm-edit-tiddler" unchecked="tm-navigate" default="tm-navigate"> Clicking a tab-link opens ''every existing'' tiddler in ''edit mode'' <$button message="tm-delete-tiddler" param="$:/plugins/wikilabs/link-to-tabs/config"> Reset to Default! "},"$:/ControlPanel/Settings/WikiLabs":{"title":"$:/ControlPanel/Settings/WikiLabs","caption":"WikiLabs","tags":"$:/tags/ControlPanel/SettingsTab","text":"Get an overview about all [[WikiLab Pugins|https://wikilabs.github.io]]
<$macrocall $name="tabs" tabsList="[all[shadows+tiddlers]tag[$:/tags/ControlPanel/WikiLabs]!has[draft.of]]" default="$:/plugins/wikilabs/link-to-tabs/settings" explicitState="$:/state/tab/settings/wikilabs" />
"},"$:/plugins/wikilabs/link-to-tabs/styles":{"title":"$:/plugins/wikilabs/link-to-tabs/styles","created":"20190712133348541","modified":"20190714104306483","tags":"$:/tags/Stylesheet","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"

.wltc-link-to-tab {
  display: {{$:/plugins/wikilabs/link-to-tabs/config!!show-all-links}};
  position: relative;
  top: -1em;
  left: -1.3em;
  font-size: 0.7em;
  opacity: {{$:/plugins/wikilabs/link-to-tabs/config!!initial-opacity}};
  margin-right: -1em;
}

.wltc-link-to-tab svg{
  width: 1.4em;
  height: 1.4em;
  color: <>;
}

.wltc-link-to-tab:hover {
  opacity: 1;
  transition:opacity {{$:/plugins/wikilabs/link-to-tabs/config!!transition}}s;
  transition-timing-function: cubic-bezier(1,-0.06,.39,.89);
}

.tc-tab-selected + .wltc-link-to-tab {
  display: {{$:/plugins/wikilabs/link-to-tabs/config!!show-single-link}};
}

.tc-vertical > .wltc-link-to-tab {
  top: -1.9em;
  left: 0;
  height: 0;
  float: right;
}

.tc-search-results .wltc-link-to-tab a {
  display: contents;
  padding: 0;
}
"}}}
